'''rofashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:mealymouthed|mealymouthed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mealymouthed|mealymouthed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rofashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofashithi|rofashithi]] || [[word:rofashiji|rofashiji]] || [[word:rofashishi|rofashishi]] || [[word:rofashiki|rofashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofashuthuthu|rofashuthuthu]] || [[word:rofashujuju|rofashujuju]] || [[word:rofashushushu|rofashushushu]] || [[word:rofashukuku|rofashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofashuthu|rofashuthu]] || [[word:rofashuju|rofashuju]] || [[word:rofashushu|rofashushu]] || [[word:rofashuku|rofashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofashufthuf|rofashufthuf]] || [[word:rofashufjuf|rofashufjuf]] || [[word:rofashufshuf|rofashufshuf]] || [[word:rofashufkuf|rofashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofashethe|rofashethe]] || [[word:rofasheje|rofasheje]] || [[word:rofasheshe|rofasheshe]] || [[word:rofasheke|rofasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofashothotho|rofashothotho]] || [[word:rofashojojo|rofashojojo]] || [[word:rofashoshosho|rofashoshosho]] || [[word:rofashokoko|rofashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofashotho|rofashotho]] || [[word:rofashojo|rofashojo]] || [[word:rofashosho|rofashosho]] || [[word:rofashoko|rofashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofashofthof|rofashofthof]] || [[word:rofashofjof|rofashofjof]] || [[word:rofashofshof|rofashofshof]] || [[word:rofashofkof|rofashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofashïfthïf|rofashïfthïf]] || [[word:rofashïfjïf|rofashïfjïf]] || [[word:rofashïfshïf|rofashïfshïf]] || [[word:rofashïfkïf|rofashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofashïfthïfthïf|rofashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:rofashïfjïfjïf|rofashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:rofashïfshïfshïf|rofashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:rofashïfkïfkïf|rofashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofashïfthïf|rofashïfthïf]] || [[word:rofashïfjïf|rofashïfjïf]] || [[word:rofashïfshïf|rofashïfshïf]] || [[word:rofashïfkïf|rofashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofashïfthïf|rofashïfthïf]] || [[word:rofashïfjïf|rofashïfjïf]] || [[word:rofashïfshïf|rofashïfshïf]] || [[word:rofashïfkïf|rofashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rofashæthæ|rofashæthæ]] || [[word:rofashæjæ|rofashæjæ]] || [[word:rofashæshæ|rofashæshæ]] || [[word:rofashækæ|rofashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rofashathatha|rofashathatha]] || [[word:rofashajaja|rofashajaja]] || [[word:rofashashasha|rofashashasha]] || [[word:rofashakaka|rofashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rofashatha|rofashatha]] || [[word:rofashaja|rofashaja]] || [[word:rofashasha|rofashasha]] || [[word:rofashaka|rofashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rofashafthaf|rofashafthaf]] || [[word:rofashafjaf|rofashafjaf]] || [[word:rofashafshaf|rofashafshaf]] || [[word:rofashafkaf|rofashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rofashasha|rofashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rofashësha|rofashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rofashrosha|rofashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rofashmusha|rofashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rofashyasha|rofashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorofashnkshësha|gorofashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorofashnkrosha|gorofashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorofashnkmusha|gorofashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorofashnkyasha|gorofashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rofafashasha|rofafashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rofafashësha|rofafashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rofafashrosha|rofafashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rofafashmusha|rofafashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rofafashyasha|rofafashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorofafashnkshësha|gorofafashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorofafashnkrosha|gorofafashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorofafashnkmusha|gorofafashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorofafashnkyasha|gorofafashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:refæshasha|refæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:refæshësha|refæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:refæshrosha|refæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:refæshmusha|refæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:refæshyasha|refæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorefæshnkshësha|gorefæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorefæshnkrosha|gorefæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorefæshnkmusha|gorefæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorefæshnkyasha|gorefæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rofashasha|rofashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rofashësha|rofashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rofashrosha|rofashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rofashmusha|rofashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rofashyasha|rofashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorofashnkshësha|gorofashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorofashnkrosha|gorofashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorofashnkmusha|gorofashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorofashnkyasha|gorofashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
